rag_rules: Place component type contracts in component type scopes using visible ports and features only.
Use assume/guarantee syntax with valid AGREE logical operators and expression patterns.
Generate syntactically valid AGREE annex blocks with proper scoping and type declarations.
generic_rules: Component type contracts should reference only visible ports and features.
Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations.
Ensure all identifiers in AGREE contracts are visible in the current scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Use `assume "label": expression;` and `guarantee "label": expression;` for assumptions and guarantees.
Equations and constants must declare valid AGREE types: int, real, bool.
anti_patterns: Do not reference implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts.
Do not use AADL property names as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports or constants.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
Model fusion and insertion location decisions
